positive: Minimalist retro-futuristic celestial cityscape view from a high vantage point. The scene features stylized, interconnected floating islands and glowing architectural spires suggesting an advanced civilization, rendered in the aesthetic of 80s vaporwave mixed with Art Deco precision. The primary colors are deep sapphire blues, electric cyan, vibrant magenta, and accented with neon gold outlines. Composition must be symmetrical and centered, creating a bold, striking silhouette suitable for repeating patterns. Include abstract constellations and glowing nebula clouds filling the sky. High contrast, crisp lines, vector-art quality, flat graphic design style, perfect for apparel printing, --ar 1:1
